trades.reasoning: RSI 68.6 in optimal bullish momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover, and NASDAQ +1.2% outperformance today signals AI/semiconductor sector strength — using remaining cash to fill an open slot with highest-quality name in the screener.

decisions.briefing: Risk-on day with NASDAQ leading S&P 500, signaling tech and growth outperformance. Existing portfolio positions in QQQ, AMZN, and SYNA are well-positioned for this environment. Used the $743 cash reserve to open NVDA — it scores 90 on momentum, sits in the ideal RSI zone (not yet overbought), and directly benefits from the AI/chip theme driving today's NASDAQ gains.

market_education.summary_en: Markets pushed higher on May 13 with the NASDAQ outpacing the broader S&P 500, a pattern consistent with renewed appetite for growth and technology names. Semiconductor and AI-linked stocks led the advance as investors rotated back into high-beta tech following recent trade tension relief. Risk-on sentiment was reinforced by stable macro data and continued optimism around enterprise AI spending cycles.
market_education.summary_zh: 5月13日美股走高，納斯達克漲幅明顯領先標普500，顯示市場對成長型及科技股的風險偏好回升。半導體與AI概念股帶動大市上揚，投資者在貿易緊張局勢緩和後重新加碼高Beta科技股。企業AI支出持續擴大的樂觀預期，加上穩健的總體經濟數據，進一步鞏固市場的風險偏好情緒。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-on describes a market environment where investors prefer higher-risk, higher-reward assets like growth stocks and tech over defensive holdings like bonds or utilities. Today's session — NASDAQ up 1.2% versus S&P 500 up only 0.6% — is a textbook risk-on signal, as money flows disproportionately into volatile, high-growth sectors. Recognizing risk-on versus risk-off days helps time entries into momentum names like NVDA.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好」（Risk-On）是指投資者傾向於買入高風險、高回報資產（如成長股、科技股），而非防禦性資產（如債券或公用事業股）的市場環境。今日納斯達克漲幅（+1.2%）明顯優於標普500（+0.6%），正是典型的風險偏好訊號——資金集中流入波動性較高的成長型板塊。掌握市場情緒的切換，有助於在如NVDA等動能強勁的個股出現最佳進場時機時及時介入。
